paper_title: Materials and methods of diatom research in Nyzhniosulsky National Nature Park

methods.description: Collection and preservation of periphyton, plankton, and benthos samples from various water bodies for diatom research.

steps.description: Periphyton, plankton and benthos samples from various types of water bodies of Nyzhniosulsky National Nature Park were collected during different seasons in 2016-2017.
steps.searchable_summary: collect biological samples from water bodies

steps.description: Samples were fixed by 4% formaldehyde for later storage in the National Herbarium of Ukraine (KW-A).
steps.searchable_summary: fix samples with formaldehyde for preservation

methods.description: Preparation and analysis of diatom samples using chemical treatment and microscopy techniques.

steps.description: For diatom research, the samples were treated according to a standard technique using concentrated 35% H2O2.
steps.searchable_summary: treat samples with H2O2 for diatom research

steps.description: The obtained frustules were mounted in Naphrax® (refractive index 1.74).
Permanent slides were studied using light microscopes MBI-6 with phase contrast, Olympus BX-53 and a scanning electron microscope JEM-1230.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze diatom slides using light and electron microscopy

methods.description: Identification of diatoms using taxonomic literature and electronic sources.

steps.description: Diatoms were identified using issues of Süßwasserflora von Mitteleuropa and other taxonomic treatments, articles, and electronic sources.
